global.brandLine: Book Writer · Japanese Food Chef · Teacher
global.footerTagline: Warm stories, Japanese food culture, and thoughtful teaching from Kouvola, Finland.

hero.kicker: Book Writer · Japanese Food Chef · Teacher
hero.title: Warm stories, Japanese food culture, and inspiring teaching in one welcoming place.
hero.text: Marjo Seki is a book writer, professional Japanese food chef, and teacher based in Kouvola, Finland. This site introduces her work, upcoming events, books, courses, and ways to get in touch.
hero.badge: Now welcoming workshop, speaking, and course inquiries

intro.title: A calm online home for readers, food lovers, and course participants.
intro.text: The site is designed to feel warm, personal, and easy to update. Marjo can share new events, replace images, and refresh the text without touching code.

features.title: Books and writing
features.text: Present books, articles, and the voice behind Marjo's writing in a personal and memorable way.

features.title: Japanese food teaching
features.text: Share cooking classes, food culture workshops, and authentic Japanese culinary experiences.

features.title: Courses and events
features.text: Keep upcoming and past events visible, with clear contact details for reservations and questions.

info.title: About Marjo, her background, and ways to collaborate.
info.lead: Visitors can learn who Marjo is, what she offers, and how to get in touch for courses, events, and speaking opportunities.
info.bioTitle: A warm voice shaped by books, Japanese food, and teaching.
info.bioText: Marjo Seki is a book writer, professional Japanese food chef, and teacher. Her work brings together storytelling, authentic food culture, and human-centered teaching. This space can be used to share her biography, teaching philosophy, and the heart behind her courses and events.

services.title: Author visits and talks
services.text: Book-centered talks, interviews, and literary appearances for libraries, communities, and events.

services.title: Japanese cooking classes
services.text: Professional teaching in Japanese food, flavors, techniques, and cultural understanding.

services.title: Courses and workshops
services.text: Warm and practical teaching sessions for groups, organizations, and private events.

events.title: Upcoming and past events, courses, and gatherings.
events.lead: Use this page to present current events, past highlights, and easy contact for reservations or questions.

upcoming.title: Japanese Home Cooking Evening
upcoming.text: A warm small-group class focused on practical Japanese home cooking, ingredients, and food culture.

upcoming.title: Author Talk and Book Discussion
upcoming.text: An online session where Marjo shares the ideas behind her writing and answers audience questions.

past.title: Spring Japanese Tea and Food Workshop
past.text: A hands-on gathering exploring Japanese tea culture, simple dishes, and the beauty of shared meals.

past.title: Community Reading Circle
past.text: A reflective reading session focused on meaningful conversation, writing, and connection.

social.title: Social highlight
social.note: This block can show a YouTube video, event trailer, or another embeddable social highlight. Facebook and Instagram links are shown in the footer.
